code: import React,{useState}from'react';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export const AddTodo=props=>{const[title,setTitle]=useState("");const[desc,setDesc]=useState("");const submit=e=>{e.preventDefault();if(!title||!desc){alert("Title or Desc cannot be empty!!");}else{props.addTodo(title,desc);setTitle("");setDesc("");}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"container my-3",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"Add A Todo"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:submit,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"mb-3",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{htmlFor:"todoName",className:"form-label",children:" Your Todo "}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",value:title,onChange:e=>{setTitle(e.target.value);},className:"form-control",id:"todoName"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"mb-3",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{htmlFor:"desc",className:"form-label",children:" Description "}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",value:desc,onChange:e=>{setDesc(e.target.value);},className:"form-control",id:"desc"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",className:"btn btn-sm btn-success",children:"Add"})]})]});};
